problem_solved: Healthcare providers need reliable drug interaction checking and medicines optimization at the point of prescribing to prevent medication errors and improve patient safety. FDB Health provides the UK's leading medicines decision support database integrated into clinical systems.
who_buys: hospitals, NHS trusts, clinical system vendors, primary care providers
key_features: Drug-drug interaction checking and alerts
Medicines terminology and dm+d compliance
Prescribing decision support integrated into EHR systems
business_model: SaaS / database licensing to clinical system vendors
why_varden_care: Proven model: specialized drug database sold via EHR integrations. FDB demonstrates how to build a sustainable B2B2H business by embedding into existing clinical workflows rather than competing with EHRs.

problem_solved: Healthcare organizations struggle with rigid EHR systems that don't adapt to clinical needs. Better provides an open digital health platform with low-code tools to build personalized clinical applications on vendor-neutral clinical data repositories.
who_buys: hospitals, healthcare systems, regional health authorities
key_features: openEHR-based clinical data repository for data persistence
Low-code platform (Better Studio) for building clinical applications
Interoperability through open standards
why_varden_care: Strong replicability: openEHR is an open standard, and the low-code approach reduces implementation costs. Varden could target similar markets (Nordics, Baltics) with an open platform strategy.

problem_solved: Cancer and rare disease patients lack equal access to precision medicine due to complex genomic data analysis requirements. SOPHiA provides AI-driven data analysis to convert complex genomic profiles into actionable clinical insights.
key_features: AI-powered genomic data analysis with 98-99% accuracy
Multi-modal health data integration (genomics, radiology, pathology)
Federated network connecting 990+ healthcare institutions globally
why_varden_care: High-value niche: precision oncology is a defensible, high-margin segment. SOPHiA demonstrates the federated data network model—aggregating insights without centralizing data—which is increasingly relevant for GDPR compliance.

problem_solved: Hospitals and care providers need integrated electronic patient records and medicines management to replace fragmented paper-based systems. System C provides cloud-based EPR and prescribing platforms for NHS and social care.
who_buys: hospitals, NHS trusts, local government social care departments
key_features: CareFlow EPR - cloud-based electronic patient record
CareFlow Medicines Management - e-prescribing and pharmacy integration
BadgerNet for maternity and neonatal care
why_varden_care: NHS-focused success: System C shows how to build deep NHS integrations. The medicines management module is a logical entry point for a new CDS vendor targeting UK hospitals.

problem_solved: Healthcare providers across Europe need modern, interoperable EHR systems that support digital health transformation. CGM provides comprehensive e-health solutions including EHR, telemedicine, and clinical information systems.
who_buys: primary care clinics, specialist practices, laboratories, occupational health, hospitals
key_features: CGM J4 - journal system for primary and specialist care
CGM Video for telemedicine consultations
Laboratory information systems integration
why_varden_care: Scale and geography: 1.6M users across 60 countries with 40+ years experience. CGM demonstrates how to build a pan-European healthcare IT business starting from the DACH region.

problem_solved: Healthcare organizations need a unified platform to manage the full continuum of care from prevention to end-of-life. Dedalus provides integrated EHR, diagnostic, and care management solutions for hospitals and regional health systems.
who_buys: hospitals, regional health authorities, diagnostic centers, laboratories
key_features: Enterprise EHR with continuum of care from prevention to follow-up
FHIR-based interoperability platform
PACS and diagnostic imaging solutions
why_varden_care: Market leader in Southern Europe: #1 KLAS ranking for Acute Care EHR in DACH and Southern Europe. Dedalus shows how to win regional tenders and build scale through acquisition.

problem_solved: Healthcare professionals, insurers, and life sciences companies need secure digital solutions for patient data management, e-prescribing, and regulatory compliance. Cegedim provides healthcare IT solutions and B2B services across Europe.
who_buys: healthcare professionals, health insurers, life sciences companies, pharmacies
key_features: Electronic health record and patient data management
Health insurance claims processing and third-party payment
CRM and data services for life sciences
why_varden_care: Diversified revenue model: Cegedim serves multiple healthcare stakeholders (providers, payers, pharma). The pharmacy software division could be a replicable entry point for new CDS solutions.

problem_solved: Clinicians need trusted, evidence-based clinical decision support at the point of care to reduce variability and improve patient outcomes. Wolters Kluwer Health provides UpToDate, Lexidrug, and ClinicalKey for clinical and drug decision support.
who_buys: hospitals, health systems, clinics, individual clinicians
key_features: UpToDate - evidence-based clinical decision support used by 3M+ clinicians
Lexidrug (formerly Lexicomp) - drug reference and interaction checker
AI-enhanced clinical content with Expert AI for generative insights
why_varden_care: Gold standard content: UpToDate demonstrates how to monetize curated clinical knowledge at scale. The enterprise model (embedding into EHRs) shows how to reach hospital-wide adoption rather than individual users.
